节点.功能描述: Provides the method of switching the cursor position.
Enum for the style of cancel button
The value of button style constant
The value of button style invisible
The value of button style input
Declare the type of search input box
Basic input mode. The value can contain digits, letters, underscores (_), spaces, and special characters.
Pure digital input mode.
Phone number entry mode. In this mode, the following are allowed: digits, spaces, plus signs (+), hyphens (-), asterisks (*), and number signs (#); the length is not limited.
E-mail address input mode. This mode accepts only digits, letters, underscores (_), dots (.), and the following special characters: ! # $ % & ' * + - / = ? ^ ` { | } ~ @ (which can only appear once)
Number decimal entry mode. The value can contain digits and one decimal point.
URL entry mode.
One time code mode.
Options used to construct the search. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Text input in the search text box.
Text input in the search text box.
Text displayed when there is no input. Anonymous Object Rectification.

Path to the search icon. Anonymous Object Rectification.

NOTE:
The icon data source can be a local or online image.

  • The supported formats include PNG, JPG, BMP, SVG, GIF, pixelmap, and HEIF.
  • The Base64 string is supported in the following format: data:image/[png|jpeg|bmp|webp|heif];base64,[base64 data], where [base64 data] is a Base64 string.

If this attribute and the searchIcon attribute are both set, the searchIcon attribute takes precedence.
Controller of the <Search> component. Anonymous Object Rectification.
The construct function of search
The options of SearchInterface. Anonymous Object Rectification.

Set the icon size

NOTE:
It cannot be set in percentage.

Set the icon resource

Set the SearchButton fontSize

NOTE:
It cannot be set in percentage.
Set the SearchButton fontColor

Automatically disables the search button before the user enters text

NOTE:
true: The search button is disabled when there is no text input.
false: The search button remains enabled regardless of the text input.

节点.功能描述:
Set the text Color

NOTE:
Universal text attributes fontSize, fontStyle, fontWeight, and fontFamily are set in the textFont attribute.
注释信息: @param { ResourceColor } value - indicates the color of the text.Default value is '#FF182431'.The default value on wearable devices is '#dbffffff'.

parameters.说明: indicates the color of the text.Default value is '#FF182431'.The default value on wearable devices is '#dbffffff'.

节点.功能描述:
Set the search icon style

NOTE:
The default icon size on wearable devices is 16 vp.
Default value in light mode: { size: '16vp', color: '#99182431', src: ' ' }
Default value in dark mode: { size: '16vp', color: '#99ffffff', src: ' ' }
注释信息: @param { IconOptions | SymbolGlyphModifier } value - indicates the style of the search icon.

parameters.说明: indicates the style of the search icon.

节点.功能描述:
Set the cancel button style

NOTE:
The default icon size on wearable devices is 18 vp.
When style is set to CancelButtonStyle.CONSTANT, the Cancel button is always displayed.
Default value: { style: CancelButtonStyle.INPUT, icon: { size: '16vp', color: '#99ffffff', src: ' ' } }
注释信息: @param { CancelButtonOptions | CancelButtonSymbolOptions } value - indicates the style of the cancel button.

parameters.说明: indicates the style of the cancel button.

节点.功能描述: Specify the indentation of the first line in a text-block.
注释信息: @param { Dimension } value - The length of text indent.Default value is 0.
@returns { SearchAttribute } The attribute of the text.

parameters.说明: The length of text indent.Default value is 0.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the inputFilter of text is set.

NOTE:
Only inputs that comply with the regular expression can be displayed.
Other inputs are filtered out.
The specified regular expression can match single characters, but not strings.
If inputFilter is set and the entered characters are not null, the filtering effect attached to the text box type (specified through the type attribute) does not take effect.
注释信息: @param { Callback<string> } error - Filtered-out content to return when regular expression matching fails.

parameters.说明: Regular expression.
Filtered-out content to return when regular expression matching fails.

节点.功能描述: Called when judging whether the text editing change finished. The text box is in the editing state when it has the caret placed in it, and is in the non-editing state otherwise.
注释信息: @param { Callback<boolean> } callback - Returns true if the component is in an editing state.

parameters.说明: Returns true if the component is in an editing state.

节点.功能描述:
Define the text selected background color of the text input.

NOTE:
If the opacity is not set, a 20% opacity will be used.

Set the cursor style

NOTE:
Since API version 12, this API can be used to set the text handle color, which is the same as the caret color.
Default value: { width: '1.5vp', color: '#007DFF' }
注释信息: @param { CaretStyle } value - indicates the style of the cursor.

parameters.说明: indicates the style of the cursor.

节点.功能描述: Set the place hold text color
注释信息: @param { ResourceColor } value - Default value is '#99182431'.The default value on wearable devices is '#99ffffff'.

parameters.说明: Default value is '#99182431'.The default value on wearable devices is '#99ffffff'.

节点.功能描述:
Set the font used for place holder text

NOTE:
The 'HarmonyOS Sans' font and registered custom fonts are supported.
The default font size on wearable devices is 18 px.

Set the font used for input text

NOTE:
Currently, only the default font family is supported.
The default font size on wearable devices is 18 fp.
Set enter key type of soft keyboard
注释信息: @param { EnterKeyType } value - Default value is EnterKeyType.Search.

parameters.说明: Default value is EnterKeyType.Search.

Call the function when editing the input text

NOTE:
In this callback, if cursor operations are performed, developers need to adjust the cursor logic based on the previewText parameter to ensure it works seamlessly within the preview display scenario.

注释信息: @param { Callback<string> } callback - Callback used to return the copied text content.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the copied text content.

节点.功能描述: Called when using the Clipboard menu. Anonymous Object Rectification.
注释信息: @param { Callback<string> } callback - Callback used to return the cut text content.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the cut text content.

节点.功能描述: Called when using the Clipboard menu. Anonymous Object Rectification.

@returns { SearchAttribute } Returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

parameters.说明: Executed when a paste operation is performed.Callback used to return the pasted text content.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the copy option is set.

NOTE:
If this attribute is set to CopyOptions.None, the text can only be pasted; all other actions, such as copying, cutting, and sharing, are disabled.
Dragging is not allowed when CopyOptions.None is set.
注释信息: @param { CopyOptions } value - Default value is CopyOptions.LocalDevice.

parameters.说明: Default value is CopyOptions.LocalDevice.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the input of maximum text length is set.

NOTE:
By default, there is no maximum number of characters.
When the maximum number is reached, no more characters can be entered.

Called when the text align is set.

NOTE:
Currently, the following alignment modes are supported: Start, Center, and End.
注释信息: @param { TextAlign } value - Default value is TextAlign.Start.

parameters.说明: Default value is TextAlign.Start.

节点.功能描述:
Sets whether request keyboard or not when on focus.

NOTE:
Since API version 10, the Search component brings up the keyboard by default when it obtains focus.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Default value is true.
@returns { SearchAttribute } Returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

parameters.说明: Default value is true.

节点.return_description: Returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

节点.功能描述:
Controls whether the selection menu pops up.

NOTE:
true: Tapping, long-pressing, double-tapping, triple-tapping, or right-clicking the text box will not trigger the system text selection menu.
false: Tapping, long-pressing, double-tapping, triple-tapping, or right-clicking the text box will trigger the system text selection menu.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Default value is false.
@returns { SearchAttribute } returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

parameters.说明: Default value is false.

节点.return_description: returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the minimum font size of the font is set.

NOTE:
For the string type, numeric string values with optional units, for example, "10" or "10fp", are supported.
For the setting to take effect, this attribute must be used together with maxFontSize or layout constraint settings.
When the adaptive font size is used, the fontSize settings do not take effect.
注释信息: @param { number | string | Resource } value - The unit is fp.

parameters.说明: The unit is fp.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the maximum font size of the font is set.

NOTE:
For the string type, numeric string values with optional units, for example, "10" or "10fp", are supported.
For the setting to take effect, this attribute must be used together with minFontSize or layout constraint settings.
When the adaptive font size is used, the fontSize settings do not take effect.
注释信息: @param { number | string | Resource } value - The unit is fp.

parameters.说明: The unit is fp.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the minimum font scale of the font is set. Value range: [0, 1]

NOTE:
The undefined type is supported.
A value less than 0 is handled as 0.
A value greater than 1 is handled as 1.
Abnormal values are ineffective by default.

Called when the maximum font scale of the font is set. Value range: [1, +∞)

NOTE:
The undefined type is supported.
A value less than 1 is handled as 1.
Abnormal values are ineffective by default.

Define custom keyboard.

NOTE:
When a custom keyboard is set, activating the text box opens the specified custom component, instead of the system input method.
The custom keyboard's height can be set through the height attribute of the custom component's root node, and its width is fixed at the default value.
The custom keyboard is presented by overlaying the original screen.
It is not compressed or lifted if avoid mode is not enabled or avoidance is not needed for the text box.
The custom keyboard cannot obtain the focus, but it blocks gesture events.
By default, the custom keyboard is closed when the input component loses the focus.
You can also use the stopEditing API to close the keyboard.
When a custom keyboard is set, the text box does not support camera input, even when the device supports.
When setting a custom keyboard, you can bind the onKeyPrelme event to prevent input from the physical keyboard.
注释信息: @param { CustomBuilder } value - Set up a custom keyboard of Search
@param { KeyboardOptions } [options] - Indicates the custom keyboard options of Search
@returns { SearchAttribute } returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

parameters.说明: Set up a custom keyboard of Search
KeyboardOptions } [options] - Indicates the custom keyboard options of Search

节点.return_description: returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

节点.功能描述: Called when the text decoration of the text is set.
注释信息: @param { TextDecorationOptions } value - Default value is { type: TextDecorationType.None, color: Color.Black, style: TextDecorationStyle.SOLID }.

parameters.说明: Default value is { type: TextDecorationType.None, color: Color.Black, style: TextDecorationStyle.SOLID }.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the distance between text fonts is set.

NOTE:
If the value specified is a percentage or 0, the default value is used.
For the string type, numeric string values with optional units, for example, "10" or "10fp", are supported.
If the value specified is a negative value, the text is compressed.
A negative value too small may result in the text being compressed to 0 and no content being displayed.
注释信息: @param { number | string | Resource } value - The unit is fp.

parameters.说明: The unit is fp.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the line height of the font is set.

NOTE:
If the value is less than or equal to 0, the line height is not limited and the font size is adaptive.
If the value is of the number type, the unit fp is used.
Called when the search type is set.
注释信息: @param { SearchType } value - Default value is SearchType.Normal.

parameters.说明: Default value is SearchType.Normal.

节点.功能描述: Set font feature. normal | <feature-tag-value>, where <feature-tag-value> = <string> [ <integer> | on | off ], like: "ss01" 0 the values of <feature-tag-value> reference to doc of search component number of <feature-tag-value> can be single or multiple, and separated by comma ','.

parameters.说明: The fontFeature.

节点.功能描述:
Get text value information when about to input.

NOTE:
It returns true if the text is inserted; returns false otherwise.
This callback is not triggered for pre-edit or candidate word operations.
It is available only for system input methods.
注释信息: @param { Callback<InsertValue, boolean> } callback - The triggered function when text content is about to insert.

parameters.说明: The triggered function when text content is about to insert.

节点.功能描述:
Get text value information when completed input.

NOTE:
It is available only for system input methods.
注释信息: @param { Callback<InsertValue> } callback - The triggered function when text content has been inserted.

parameters.说明: The triggered function when text content has been inserted.

节点.功能描述:
Get text value information when about to delete.

NOTE:
It returns true if the text is deleted; returns false otherwise.
This callback is not invoked for text preview.
It is available only for system input methods.
注释信息: @param { Callback<DeleteValue, boolean> } callback - The triggered function when text content is about to delete.

parameters.说明: The triggered function when text content is about to delete.

节点.功能描述:
Get text value information when the deletion has been completed

NOTE:
It is available only for system input methods.
注释信息: @param { Callback<DeleteValue> } callback - The triggered function when text content has been deleted.

parameters.说明: The triggered function when text content has been deleted.

节点.功能描述: Called before the search component attach the InputMethod.
注释信息: @param { Callback<IMEClient> } callback - The triggered function before attach the InputMethod.

parameters.说明: The triggered function before attach the InputMethod.

节点.功能描述: Set the custom text menu. Sets the extended options of the custom context menu on selection, including the text content, icon, and callback.
注释信息: @param { EditMenuOptions } editMenu - Customize text menu options.

parameters.说明: Customize text menu options.

节点.功能描述:
Define the preview text mode of the text input.

NOTE:
Preview text is in a temporary state and does not support text interception.
As such, it does not trigger onWillInsert, onDidInsert, onWillDelete, or onDidDelete callbacks.
注释信息: @param { boolean } enable - Indicates the preview text mode.Default value is true.

parameters.说明: Indicates the preview text mode.Default value is true.

节点.功能描述:
Enable or disable haptic feedback.

NOTE:
To enable haptic feedback, you must declare the ohos.permission.VIBRATE permission under requestPermissions in the module.json5 file of the project. "requestPermissions": [ { "name": "ohos.permission.VIBRATE", } ]
注释信息: @param { boolean } isEnabled - Default value is true, set false to disable haptic feedback.
@returns { SearchAttribute } returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

parameters.说明: Default value is true, set false to disable haptic feedback.

节点.return_description: returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

节点.功能描述: Set text mode of automatic case mode switching.
注释信息: @param { AutoCapitalizationMode } mode - Automatic case mode switching.

parameters.说明: Automatic case mode switching.

节点.功能描述: Set the text with half leading.
注释信息: @param { Optional<boolean> } halfLeading - Default value is false.The value true means that half leading is enabled, and false means the opposite.

parameters.说明: Default value is false.The value true means that half leading is enabled, and false means the opposite.

节点.功能描述: Set whether stop backPressed callback event or not.
注释信息: @param { Optional<boolean> } isStopped - Default value is true, set false to trigger the latest callback event.
@returns { SearchAttribute } returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

parameters.说明: Default value is true, set false to trigger the latest callback event.

节点.return_description: returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

节点.功能描述:
Get text value information when about to change.

NOTE:
This callback is triggered after onWillInsert and onWillDelete, but before onDidInsert and onDidDelete.

Returning true allows the change to proceed, while returning false cancels the change.
注释信息: @param { Callback<EditableTextChangeValue, boolean> } callback - The triggered function when text content is about to change.

parameters.说明: The triggered function when text content is about to change.

节点.功能描述: Set the keyboard appearance.
注释信息: @param { Optional<KeyboardAppearance> } appearance - Default value is KeyboardAppearance.NONE_IMMERSIVE
@returns { SearchAttribute } returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

parameters.说明: Default value is KeyboardAppearance.NONE_IMMERSIVE

节点.return_description: returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

@returns { SearchAttribute } returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.

@returns { SearchAttribute } returns the instance of the SearchAttribute.
